name: Sherrod Brown
subject: More dark money. Thanks, Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
The new administration's rule could let even more money into politics.
|
---

| | Peter, the Trump administration passed a rule that lets certain dark money groups withhold the names of their largest donors from the IRS. **That's ridiculous. So I am working to overturn that rule immediately and bring transparency and accountability to our democracy.** If you want to fight back against the latest efforts to allow more dark money in our politics, [**you can do that by clicking this link and signing your name.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdc7/4462dc26/895c0a56/201efff7/1157348356/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181217a") If you want to read more about the details on this rule and what we're doing to stop it, keep reading. Trump's new dark money rule comes courtesy of the Treasury Department and IRS. The rule says that certain tax-exempt organizations will no longer be required to report the names of their big donors to the IRS. To put this in perspective -- a local non-profit organization in Ohio has to disclose donors who give $5,000 or more to the IRS. But with this rule, political dark money groups would be able to hide donors at the same level. **They can receive hundreds of millions of dollars and keep it secret.** This is a great deal for billionaires and corporations who want to influence our elections. But it's a rotten deal for voters. _Fortunately, we have the means to overturn it._ The Congressional Review Act gives Congress the power to overturn agency rules within a certain window of time -- and now, the clock's ticking. We have a chance to fight back against this disastrous rule, but we have to act quickly. So today, I'm asking you to join me in speaking out. Help me rev-up some grassroots pressure to overturn the Trump administration's new rule and prevent more dark money from influencing our elections. [**Make your support known. Add your name to mine and thousands of others. Share this effort on social media. Let 's make some noise on this today >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdc7/4462dc26/895c0a56/201efff6/1157348356/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181217m") With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdc7/4462dc26/895c0a56/201efff5/1157348356/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: re: You didn’t want to wish them Merry Christmas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Is this right? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b2700e8fc9f7e1f8241e757129a4d9e0056a8b3962f3f5825d18f1ad12e016ab4fae9acbabed852f149caf54cd379d58430daddc609ea846)
---

Friend,

Did you not want to wish the President a Merry Christmas?

**...Your name is *NOT* yet on the Official First Family Christmas Card.**
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b2700e8fc9f7e1f8937d349267d0119a1f7abe4a58e3d2f6a03c6daf18b7557c1774efaa433f3f26ca2d4cf61a731475bb583ae6eb3e1b79) President Trump and the First Lady have been working so hard to bring Christmas cheer to the White House...

...Because it's not just their home. It's your home too.

That's why the official Christmas card we give them on Christmas Eve won't be complete _without your name_.

**[Please sign the Official First Family Christmas Card in the NEXT HOUR to add your personal message.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b2700e8fc9f7e1f8aabbf4ccc106c54f40acd7f94d119d60ae4030f648ec7d697b6a1ffa5b04de248ffb486ca07d85ed49cc89532a722e38)**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: White House Nominee for Drug Czar: Hope and Healing Amid the Horrors of Addiction This Holiday Season
body:
In Fox News, Jim Carroll—President Donald J. Trump’s nominee for Director of the Office of National Drug Control Policy—writes... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e091d39a76&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **White House Nominee for Drug Czar: Hope and Healing Amid the Horrors of Addiction This Holiday Season**

In Fox News, Jim Carroll—President Donald J. Trump’s nominee for Director of the Office of National Drug Control Policy—writes that this Christmas season is a time to keep those struggling with opioid addiction in our thoughts.

“The White House has erected the Recovery and Remembrance Tree as part of its Christmas decorations. Like many Christmas trees, this one is decorated with lights, ornaments, and a star on top. However, this tree is also adorned with notes sharing the stories of people battling against an addiction,” Carroll writes.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8078a051b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5291697bc3&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Paris Dennard writes that President Trump has been a champion for black Americans, turning campaign promises “into federal policy for the betterment of all Americans, especially those in fragile communities and black Americans. His ‘jobs and justice’ agenda has focused on criminal justice reform, Opportunity Zones, and tremendous rule changes at the Department of Labor that will make positive impacts in the lives of minority small business owners and those with 401ks.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf7875fb1e&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Rep. Mike Conaway (R-TX) and American Farm Bureau Foundation President Zippy Duvall write that the Trump Administration’s Clean Water Rule is a big win for America’s farmers. “The new Clean Water Rule empowers land owners with the clarity they need to comply with the Clean Water Act. Now, farmers, ranchers, and other small business owners will be able to look at their land and know—without a team of scientists and attorneys—which parts of their land are regulated.”
---
|
---
| “Over the past few months, Energy Secretary Rick Perry has been delivering an important message to our country’s allies: America’s energy renaissance is your gift, too. As Perry said at the beginning of the year, ‘The United States is not just exporting energy, we’re exporting freedom,’” Katie Tubb and Nicolas Loris write in _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=001e81b519&e=3ee4985eea)_. “When domestic producers have new customers abroad, America’s allies will have more energy choice as well as freedom from hostile actors.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f83fc255f0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59e4c07a0e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b1f9fbe10c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Late Friday night, a judge in Texas threw the future of our healthcare system into jeopardy.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181218_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Late Friday night, an activist judge in Texas threw the future of our healthcare system into jeopardy. His ruling against the Affordable Care Act puts millions of Americans at risk. **And let 's be clear why we are facing this potential catastrophe once again: Republicans at the national and state level have continued to wage war against healthcare. Patients with pre-existing conditions, seniors concerned about the cost of their prescriptions, and women who need access to affordable birth control -- are all at risk ****in****this moment.** We cannot sit back and expect Republicans to let up now. We must use our new House majority and fight with everything we have in the U.S. Senate to protect and expand healthcare coverage for everyone who needs it. I'm ready to keep this fight front and center in the new Congress, but I'm facing another tough re-election fight and I need you with me. **[Will you make a contribution now before our 2018 end-of-year deadline to say you're ready to fight with me to protect healthcare?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181218_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181218_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Republicans treat healthcare as a political issue to exploit, but for millions of Americans, this is personal. We all know someone with a pre-existing condition or someone in need of healthcare -- and we can't let up on this fight even for a second. Thank you, Tina Smith | **Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race NBC News has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181218_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Tip jars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- I regularly travel back and forth between Washington, D.C. and my home in Cleveland. That means I spend quite a bit of time in airports, and every once in a while, I drop by the United lounge. During one of those recent trips, I noticed something troubling. I looked up and down the bar and realized there wasn't a tip jar. I asked the bartenders about it and they said it was corporate policy. They weren't allowed to put a tip jar on the bar because it "compromises the experience of the traveler." It also drastically reduced the amount of tips the workers receive, by quite a bit. Peter, this "corporate policy" may not seem like a big deal. But it's a big deal to these bartenders, who rely on tips to get ahead. Not having that jar takes $50 or $100 out of their pockets per night. And it's a big deal to me, because it underlines a larger issue across this country. Too many executives, and too many in Washington are failing to recognize the value of work. **I don't care if you're working in the United lounge, at the gate, or flying the plane -- your work deserves to be respected and rewarded.** All work has dignity. No fight for workers is too big or too small. I've spoken to United's CEO and I intend to continue pushing this until the tip jar policy is changed. **And I'm counting on you to back me up.** [**We support the dignity of work at all levels. Whether you punch a clock, collect a salary, or rely on tips -- your work should be respected. Add your name if you agree.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdda/4462dc26/8973a46f/201effc2/2622962265/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181218m") With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---

| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Preparing for the tough fights ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
This year, we asked you to dream big and get to work organizing with us. Let's keep fighting. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa66c/34a064cc/41f9f98/70c735f/4200676778/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE181218&source=IE181218")

| | | Friend, This year, we asked you to dream big and get to work organizing with us. Because you joined our fight, we transformed Georgia, and together, we built something many didn't think was possible. Yet last month, we were reminded that elections in Georgia are still not free and fair, and voters are still being denied their rights. [**I 'm asking for your help because our work is not over. Can you make a contribution to Fair Fight today to defend the fundamental right to vote? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa66c/34a064cc/41f9f98/70c735c/4200676778/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE121818-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+asking+for+your+help+because+our&utm_campaign=IE181218&source=IE181218") By showing up and stepping up this year, you helped Democrats secure their largest numbers in the Georgia state legislature in a decade. You flipped the 6th district and sent Lucy McBath to Congress. And together, you turned out more voters than even presidential campaigns and engaged an electorate that looked like Georgia - younger and more diverse. [**Now, with 2019 approaching, we have a chance to create big, bold change in our state that will transform democracy for decades to come - and we 're counting on you to help make it happen.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa66c/34a064cc/41f9f98/70c735d/4200676778/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE121818-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Now+with+2019+approaching+we+have+a+chan&utm_campaign=IE181218&source=IE181218") We always knew that November 6 was not the end of this story. Because movements for change are not built overnight, and they do not end when polls close. They take work. So here's the truth: We are in for a tough fight. But together, we can again do what many consider impossible. And to do that, we need you with us. Thats why I have to ask: [**Chip in today to reform Georgia 's electoral system and help create true access to democracy. We can't do it without you.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa66c/34a064cc/41f9f98/70c735a/4200676778/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE121818-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+today+to+reform+Georgiarsquos+el&utm_campaign=IE181218&source=IE181218") Onward, Lauren
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa66c/34a064cc/41f9f98/70c735b/4200676778/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE121818-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=IE181218&source=IE181218")**

clean_body: This year, we asked you to dream big and get to work organizing with us. Let's keep fighting. | "" | | | Friend, This year, we asked you to dream big and get to work organizing with us. Because you joined our fight, we transformed Georgia, and together, we built something many didn't think was possible. Yet last month, we were reminded that elections in Georgia are still not free and fair, and voters are still being denied their rights. "" By showing up and stepping up this year, you helped Democrats secure their largest numbers in the Georgia state legislature in a decade. You flipped the 6th district and sent Lucy McBath to Congress. And together, you turned out more voters than even presidential campaigns and engaged an electorate that looked like Georgia - younger and more diverse. "" We always knew that November 6 was not the end of this story. Because movements for change are not built overnight, and they do not end when polls close. They take work. So here's the truth: We are in for a tough fight. But together, we can again do what many consider impossible. And to do that, we need you with us. Thats why I have to ask: "" Onward, Lauren "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible.
